steps.prompt: Read all entity files in analysis/entities/*.md. For each entity with monitoring triggers (checkbox items under ## Monitoring or similar sections), check current data against those triggers. For RESEARCH/BUY entities: check Form 4, price action, 8-K filings. For AVOID entities: check upgrade triggers. Write report to .claude/plans/trigger-monitor-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md listing: entity, trigger, status (fired/clear), evidence. If any trigger fires, print the orchestrator submit command: uv run python3 ~/Projects/agent-infra/scripts/orchestrator.py submit deep-dive --project intel --vars ticker=TICKER trigger="<fired trigger description>"
